use_cases: Displaying available gradient palettes in design tools or creative platforms
Previewing color schemes for UI component customization
Showing brand color gradients in a visual reference grid
Providing gradient selection options in a color picker interface
ai_summary: A gradient showcase component that renders multiple gradient presets from the visx library in a responsive grid layout using SVG. Each gradient fills a rounded rectangle bar, creating a visual catalog of color transitions. Built with React and visx/shape for rendering, suitable for design tools or any application needing to display color gradient options.
